description_long: This is an irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular profile and a mix of gray, white, and brown coloration. The surface is coarse and uneven, with visible mineral veins and patches of discoloration, suggesting natural weathering. One side rises higher, forming a prominent peak, while the rest of the body is lower and more horizontally extended. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or openings. Its texture is rough, with jagged edges and a matte finish that scatters light rather than reflecting it. The overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A rugged, angular rock with gray, white, and brown tones, featuring a rough, weathered surface and a prominent peak on one side.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's elongated body with a prominent, raised section on the left and a rough, uneven surface throughout.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rock's peak is more pronounced, and the tapering end is visible, highlighting its angular, jagged form.
description_view_2: This side reveals a broader, flatter face with the peak on the right, showing more of the rock's white and gray mineral streaks.
description_view_3: The rock appears almost triangular from this perspective, with the peak facing forward and the surface texture and color variations clearly visible.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
